reasoning: Focus on lactate clearance and aerobic base. Your ride on the 25th showed you're building fitness, but we need to address that 9.3% power drop. This workout will help prepare you for the Alpine Loop by enhancing fatigue resistance over similar terrain.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Alternate 5 mins at 201W-218W with 5 mins at 242W-256W. Aim for 3 sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
